channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Mad Cool Festival 2026 Day Three Features Halsey, Pixies, Cliffords and Interpol Performances
item.description: The third day of the Mad Cool Festival 2026 showcased a diverse lineup of rock and alternative acts, including Halsey, Pixies, Cliffords, and Interpol. Halsey delivered an energetic set with high-ener...

item.title: Bipartisan Housing Bill Passes Despite Trump's Inaction, Sparking GOP Division and Democratic Unity
item.description: The bipartisan ROAD to Housing Act became law after President Donald Trump refused to sign or veto it, sparking mixed reactions from political factions. The bill, which aims to address housing afforda...

item.title: Exploring Sachidanandan's Poetic Resistance Against Social Inequality
item.description: The text delves into the socio-political dimensions of Sachidanandan's poetry, emphasizing its role in amplifying subaltern voices and challenging oppressive structures. It highlights how his work tra...

item.title: South African Footballer Jayden Adams Dies After Losing Grandmother During World Cup
item.description: South African footballer Jayden Adams passed away after experiencing personal tragedy during the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The midfielder lost his grandmother, Marianna Adams, just days before the tourname...

item.title: MAHE Vice-Chancellor advocates skill centres for doctors in Mangaluru region
item.description: The article discusses the need for establishing a skill development centre for medical graduates and postgraduates in Mangaluru and Udupi regions. MAHE's Vice-Chancellor, K. Sharath Kumar Rao, emphasi...

item.title: Calgary City Rescinds Noise Ticket Amid Rising Complaints During Stampede
item.description: The City of Calgary has rescinded a noise bylaw ticket issued to a Stampede music tent after reviewing complaints about sound levels. Noise complaints have increased this year compared to 2025, with 1...

item.title: By-Election Results Show DCP Candidate Leading in Ol Kalou Constituency
item.description: A new opinion survey conducted across all five wards of Ol Kalou Constituency has revealed that Democracy for the Citizens (DCP) candidate Sammy Douglas Kamau Waweru is leading with 70.2% support, sig...

item.title: DA's Communication Crisis and Internal Struggles
item.description: The article discusses the Democratic Alliance (DA) facing a crisis in its communication strategy and internal leadership dynamics. It highlights allegations against former DA leader Tony Leon and his ...

item.title: Barbie's Cradle Reunites After Two Decades, Celebrates New Music and Charity Efforts
item.description: After over two decades since their last collaboration, the iconic Filipino band Barbie’s Cradle has reunited to celebrate their new music releases. The group, consisting of Barbie Almalbis Honasan, Ro...

item.title: Ooni praises security agencies' bravery in Oyo school rescue operation
item.description: The Ooni of Ife, Oba Adeyeye Ogunwusi, has commended the bravery and professionalism of Nigeria's security agencies following the successful rescue of abducted schoolchildren and teachers in Oyo State...

item.title: Tanzanian Business Leader Bosco Honored at Funeral Ceremony
item.description: The passing of prominent Tanzanian entrepreneur Bosco has prompted widespread mourning within the business community, with his funeral ceremony drawing attendees from various sectors. While specific d...

item.title: Rigathi Gachagua Warns Fred Matiang'i Against Defecting to Ruto's Camp
item.description: Rigathi Gachagua, leader of the Democratic Convention Party, has publicly cautioned Fred Matiang'i, a deputy leader in the Jubilee Party, against being intimidated by the Ruto administration's tactics...

item.title: PVL Match Recap: Zus Coffee Triumphs Over Choco Mucho in Batangas
item.description: The Premier Volleyball League (PVL) witnessed a decisive victory as Zus Coffee swept Choco Mucho during their match held in Batangas on July 11, 2026. This result underscores the team's strong perform...

item.title: Trump Administration Subpoenas New York Times Reporters Over Coverage of Qatari Aircraft
item.description: The Trump administration faced widespread criticism after reports emerged that it had subpoenaed four New York Times journalists who covered security concerns surrounding a Boeing 747 donated by Qatar...

item.title: Harry Kane shares experience of golfing with Donald Trump
item.description: England's soccer captain Harry Kane has shared details about his golf outing with former US President Donald Trump, describing the encounter as 'surreal'. The meeting took place in Palm Beach, Florida...

item.title: How audiobooks and graphic novels sparked a love of reading in my dyslexic children
item.description: Kylie Howarth, a children's author and illustrator from Western Australia, shares her journey of nurturing a love for reading in her dyslexic children. Despite growing up in a book-filled home, her yo...

item.title: Dangerous Work at Sea: Tuna Fisheries and the Risks for Observers
item.description: The article explores the perilous realities faced by fisheries observers in the Pacific tuna industry, where illegal fishing and corporate negligence have led to fatal incidents and disappearances. Ob...

item.title: Alberta experiences unusually high tornado activity this year due to favorable weather conditions
item.description: Alberta has seen an unprecedented increase in tornado activity this year, with at least 23 confirmed tornadoes as of July 11, 2026. This surpasses the annual average of 34 tornadoes across the prairie...

item.title: Government expands land formalisation drive in Misungwi to reduce disputes and strengthen land ownership
item.description: The Government of Tanzania has stepped up its land formalisation programme in Misungwi District, Mwanza Region, calling on wananchi to fully participate in land surveying and registration activities a...

item.title: US and Iran negotiate safe passage through Strait of Hormuz amid tensions
item.description: The article details ongoing negotiations between the United States and Iran over secure shipping lanes through the Strait of Hormuz, a critical oil transit route. Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araqch...
